name: 2025 New Mexico MSSA Technical Report
summary: Official New Mexico MSSA technical report describing automated scoring model training and validation for the 2024-2025 state summative assessment. The report states that some English non-accommodated operational forms used field-test and operational responses supplemented with LLM-generated synthetic responses for Writing items with sparse high-score examples.

access_attempts.notes: Official NM-MSSA resources page lists the 2024-2025 NM-MSSA Technical Report.
PDF downloaded and text extracted locally; relevant passages located in Section 6.2.2.2, pages 48-50.
